'''bazuvu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kwangoside|kwangoside]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-z-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kwangoside|kwangoside]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| bazuvu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæzivith|bæzivith]] || [[word:bæzivij|bæzivij]] || [[word:bæzivish|bæzivish]] || [[word:bæzivi|bæzivi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bazuzuvuth|bazuzuvuth]] || [[word:bazuzuvuj|bazuzuvuj]] || [[word:bazuzuvush|bazuzuvush]] || [[word:bazuzuvu|bazuzuvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bazuvuth|bazuvuth]] || [[word:bazuvuj|bazuvuj]] || [[word:bazuvush|bazuvush]] || [[word:bazuvu|bazuvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bazufvuth|bazufvuth]] || [[word:bazufvuj|bazufvuj]] || [[word:bazufvush|bazufvush]] || [[word:bazufvuf|bazufvuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bazuvuthu|bazuvuthu]] || [[word:bazuvuju|bazuvuju]] || [[word:bazuvushu|bazuvushu]] || [[word:bazuvuku|bazuvuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bazuvuth|bazuvuth]] || [[word:bazuvuj|bazuvuj]] || [[word:bazuvush|bazuvush]] || [[word:bazuvu|bazuvu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bazuvuthul|bazuvuthul]] || [[word:bazuvujul|bazuvujul]] || [[word:bazuvushul|bazuvushul]] || [[word:bazuvukul|bazuvukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bazuvuthuthu|bazuvuthuthu]] || [[word:bazuvujuju|bazuvujuju]] || [[word:bazuvushushu|bazuvushushu]] || [[word:bazuvuku|bazuvuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bazuvuthun|bazuvuthun]] || [[word:bazuvujun|bazuvujun]] || [[word:bazuvushun|bazuvushun]] || [[word:bazuvukun|bazuvukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bazuvuthuoro|bazuvuthuoro]] || [[word:bazuvujuoro|bazuvujuoro]] || [[word:bazuvushuoro|bazuvushuoro]] || [[word:bazuvukuoro|bazuvukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
